---
name: Example World Submission
about: Submit a world record chain for inclusion in the examples/ directory
title: '[Example] '
labels: example
assignees: ''
---

## World Name

The name of the world you're submitting.

## Domain / Use Case

What kind of world is this? (e.g., music collective, competitive tournament, franchise universe, tabletop campaign, original fiction)

## Record Types Demonstrated

Which `world.ptah.*` record types does your example use? Check all that apply.

- [ ] `world.ptah.world`
- [ ] `world.ptah.character`
- [ ] `world.ptah.template`
- [ ] `world.ptah.action`
- [ ] `world.ptah.event`
- [ ] `world.ptah.log`
- [ ] `world.ptah.origin`
- [ ] `world.ptah.location`
- [ ] `world.ptah.collection`
- [ ] `world.ptah.cadence`
- [ ] `world.ptah.trace`
- [ ] `world.ptah.usage`
- [ ] `world.ptah.version`
- [ ] `world.ptah.flax`

## Is This a Live World?

Are these records actually published to the ATProto network? If yes, include the AT URI for the root `world.ptah.world` record.

## Example Content

Paste your example here, or link to a draft PR. Follow the format used in the existing `examples/` files.
